currentPosition: Co-founder & interim CEO, Zephram · Oxford, UK
interests: Machine Learning and Generative Modeling for Multiphysics and Design

summaries.ceo: Co-Founder and Interim CEO of Zephram $20M Oxford-based R&D company building multi-agent and inference technology for scientific research. 12+ years in software engineering, algorithm design and analysis, and former research scientist at Quantinuum and QuEra using machine learning for physics-inspired generative modeling and optimization.
summaries.RS: Electrical and Computer Engineering Ph.D. working on machine learning, physics-inspired generative models, and optimization. 12+ years of experience in software engineering and 9+ years in algorithm design and analysis.
summaries.RS_cas: I mainly work on machine learning, physics-inspired generative models, and optimization. I occasionally work on computational physics and math too. 12+ years of experience in software engineering and 9+ years in algorithm design and analysis.
summaries.op: Electrical and Computer Engineering Ph.D. with 12+ years of experience in software engineering and 9+ years in algorithm design and analysis. Leader of a team of 16 data scientists and engineers developing breakthroughs in machine learning assisted optimization algorithms for applications in computational electromagnetics and quantum optics.
summaries.web: Machine Learning Ph.D. candidate with 12+ years of experience in software engineering and 8+ years in algorithm design and analysis. Leader of a team of 16 data scientists and engineers, developing breakthroughs in machine learning with applications in generative AI, computer vision, and quantum.
summaries.qml: Quantum machine learning Ph.D. candidate and founder of the NanoML team developing machine learning algorithms for quantum generative AI and photonics. 12+ years of experience in software engineering and 8+ years in algorithm design and analysis.

statementsNote: Long-form statements live in src/content/cv/research-statement.mdx and teaching-statement.mdx
